title: androsace septentrionalis subsp. robusta
intro: Androsace septentrionalis subsp. robusta, also known as the northern rock jasmine, is a plant species in the Primulaceae family. It is a perennial herb that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and as an anti-inflammatory agent. The plant contains flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been found to have antioxidant and antimicrobial properties, providing several health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Androsace septentrionalis subsp. robusta can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat colds, coughs, and sore throats.
